data.title: NEXCOM to showcase innovations at MWC Barcelona 2026 with expanded edge, security solutions. Leading supplier of network appliances.
data.description: NEXCOM, a prominent provider of network appliances, will be participating in MWC Barcelona 2026 to showcase an expanded range of products aimed at enhancing networks for telecom, enterprise, and industrial settings. This move underscores their dedication to supporting next-generation networks.

data.title: Stay stylish at Le Méridien Saigon for Tet getaway on Jan 12, 2026. Located in the heart of HCMC financial district, offering over 50% rooms.
data.description: In Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, on January 12, 2026, Le Méridien Saigon is situated on Ton Duc Thang Street, a prominent location in the financial district. The hotel stands out with more than 50% of its rooms providing excellent views.
Crude Gains Amid Worries About Potential Iranian Export Impact

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to DataBank Series 2026-1 Notes, fifth ABS issuance from DataBank, with shared collateral pool.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to two classes of notes (Series 2026-1 Notes) from Databank Issuer, LLC and DatabankCo-Issuer, LLC Series 2026-1, a colocation data center ABS transaction. This marks the fifth ABS issuance from these entities. The transaction involves a shared collateral pool, set to expand with additional collateral upon the closing date of DB 2026-1. KBRA’s rating analysis is inclusive of important figures for this transaction.
Profit-Taking Hits Gold as Price Retreats from $4,600/oz Peak

data.title: Vistra Corp. prices private offering of $2.25 billion senior secured notes. $1 billion part of the aggregate amount.
data.description: Vistra Corp. (NYSE: VST), based in Irving, Texas, disclosed on January 12, 2026, that it has finalized the pricing for a private offering, totaling $2.25 billion in aggregate principal amount of senior secured notes. This comprises $1.0 billion in principal amount for a specified purpose. The offering aims to provide financial support and enhance the company's liquidity.

data.title: Wise F&I introduces The Drive Academy with Dale Patten as Director of Training and Development on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: In St. Louis on January 12, 2026, Wise F&I, a prominent finance and insurance products provider, announced the appointment of Dale Patten to the position of Director of Training and Development. Patten will be spearheading The Drive Academy, a new hands-on training initiative by the company.

data.title: Bitcoin surges to $92,000 amid US DOJ's probe into Fed chair. Can BTC's momentum endure?
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged to $92,000 following remarks from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell regarding the possibility of a Department of Justice investigation into the Federal Reserve. The question now arises: can Bitcoin maintain its current momentum amidst this uncertainty?
Hong Kong’s Hang Seng Breaks 27,000, Gains 1.77%

data.title: TCL dominates CES 2026 with award-winning SQD-Mini LED and NXTPAPER technologies. #1 in Mini LED TV and ultra-large TV brand.
data.description: TCL, a renowned consumer electronics brand, unveiled its esteemed SQD-Mini LED and NXTPAPER technologies at CES on Jan. 12, 2026. Based in Irvine, California, the company is recognized as the top Mini LED TV and ultra-large TV manufacturer globally. At the prestigious tech event, the company showcased its cutting-edge innovations, making a significant impact in the industry.

data.title: Oricell Therapeutics raised US$70M in financing to advance solid tumor CAR-T therapies globally.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Oricell Therapeutics Holdings Limited, a prominent company in cancer immunotherapy based in Shanghai and San Francisco, completed a Series C1 financing round, raising $70 million. The financing was co-led by Beijing Medical and Health, signifying a significant milestone for the company in advancing its innovative treatments for cancer.
